_note: Copy to copilot-mcp.config.json (gitignored) and point COPILOT_MCP_CONFIG at it. copilot.profiles is optional (per-account creds); top-level copilot.prod/pre_prod are used when no profile is passed. The uipath.queueUrl/addQueueItemPath/serverUrlByEnv fields are only needed for build_queue_item. overrides is optional (per-prodUid clone remaps). Alternatively set COPILOT_MCP_LOCAL_DIR to a dir holding the legacy split files order-copy-credentials.json + uipath-config.json (+ overrides.json). Config edits are picked up live on the next tool call — no server restart needed.

uipath.bearer: <UiPath Personal Access Token with OR.Jobs read scope>
